overall.description: First-person motorcycle driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077. The player rides through a dark desert highway at night, passing neon-lit landmarks and other vehicles. The scene features high-speed travel with futuristic UI elements visible on screen.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a rough dirt path with red and white barriers, passing a railroad crossing sign before transitioning onto a paved asphalt highway. The environment is dark and open with sparse vegetation.

segments.scene_description: Driving on a paved multi-lane highway, the camera approaches and passes under an overpass with twin billboards. The player overtakes a red sports car and later a blue sedan while wind turbines become visible in the distant background.

segments.scene_description: The highway approaches a distinctive neon star-shaped motel sign glowing pink against the night sky. The player slows down while passing a desert gas station and navigating around other vehicles, with buildings visible on the right side.

segments.scene_description: Returning to open highway, the camera maintains high speed while passing wind turbines and large billboards. The neon star motel recedes into the distance as the player continues through the dark desert landscape with occasional traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey that begins on a rugged desert path and transitions into a neon-lit highway corridor. It begins by navigating a rough dirt track past red and white barriers and a railroad crossing before smoothly merging onto a paved asphalt highway. As the camera accelerates, the scene opens up to a multi-lane road where the rider overtakes a red sports car and a blue sedan beneath a twin-billboard overpass, with wind turbines appearing on the distant horizon. The environment then shifts toward a pocket of civilization, slowing down to pass a desert gas station and a glowing pink star-shaped motel sign that cuts through the night sky. Finally, the camera surges back to high speed, leaving the neon lights behind to race past towering billboards and wind turbines through the dark, open expanse of the desert.
